mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_notification WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND region IN (#{region},'GLOBAL')

SELECT FROM user_notification n LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id=n.actor_user_id WHERE n.user_id=#{userId} AND n.region IN (#{region},'GLOBAL') ORDER BY n.created_at DESC,n.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(aggregate_count),0) FROM user_notification WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND region IN (#{region},'GLOBAL') AND is_read=FALSE

SELECT FROM user_notification n LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id=n.actor_user_id WHERE n.user_id=#{userId} AND n.region=#{region} AND n.type=#{type} AND n.link_url=#{linkUrl} AND n.is_read=FALSE ORDER BY n.created_at DESC,n.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM user_notification n LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id=n.actor_user_id WHERE n.id=#{id} AND n.user_id=#{userId} AND n.region IN (#{region},'GLOBAL')
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notification SET is_read=TRUE,read_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND user_id=#{userId} AND region IN (#{region},'GLOBAL') AND is_read=FALSE
